TH_RIN-BLUE_STAR.title: Stray into Black City
TH_RIN-BLUE_STAR.loss: Burnt to charcoal by a dragon's breath.
TH_RIN-BLUE_STAR.pages.INITIAL.descripti:
After tripping over a [red][jitter]step[/jitter][/red] that inexplicably jutted out of the ground, you barely catch yourself and realize you have somehow wandered into what looks like an ancient battlefield.

A [purple][jitter]fierce and terrifying black dragon[/jitter][/purple] circles overhead, while on the ground a group of strange-looking cats are pushing a small cart together. On the cart lies a [jitter]barely alive[/jitter] human.

You walk over and ask, and learn from the cats that the human on the cart is a hunter. He had tried to hunt this black dragon but failed.

Now they are helping to send the hunter back to a resting place. What do you choose to do?
TH_RIN-BLUE_STAR.pages.JOIN.description:
You decide to help these cats send the hunter back. After all, that dragon in the sky looks [jitter]quite formidable[/jitter].

Besides, they say you can get a reward for delivering him. Why not?
TH_RIN-BLUE_STAR.pages.INITIAL.options.H: Enter an [purple][jitter]extremely difficult[/jitter][/purple] combat. Gain a special [gold]Relic[/gold].
TH_RIN-BLUE_STAR.pages.HUNT.description:
With your help, the dragon is successfully defeated. The Hunters' Guild, in recognition of your outstanding contribution, forges a medal of honor for you.

Whether it's your imagination or not, you feel that wearing it increases your combat power against powerful creatures as if [jitter]several times over[/jitter].
TH_RIN-LAZY_DEATH.title: Slacking Death
TH_RIN-LAZY_DEATH.pages.INITIAL.descript:
As you pass by a river, you see [purple]Komachi[/purple] sound asleep on a cart on the opposite bank.

[fade_in]Undoubtedly, she's slacking off again.[/fade_in]

So, what do you do?
TH_RIN-LAZY_DEATH.pages.LEAVE.descriptio: Better to avoid trouble, you think, and decide to pretend you didn't see her, continuing deeper into the tower.
TH_RIN-LAZY_DEATH.pages.REPORT.descripti:
Although you feel a bit sorry for [purple]Komachi[/purple], in the spirit of being responsible for work, you decide to tell [green]Lady Eiki[/green] about this so she can catch the slacker and put her back to work.

Notably, the fair and rewarding [green]Lady Eiki[/green] also gives you some money as a reward.
TH_RIN-LAZY_DEATH.pages.LEARN.descriptio:
To be honest, you kind of admire [purple]Komachi[/purple].

— Although she often gets caught slacking, as the saying goes, "It's impossible to never get your feet wet when you walk by the river." But that's just the tip of the iceberg compared to the countless times she has slacked off.

So you wake her up, and the two of you discuss related techniques for a while. Your knowledge of slacking has increased.
TH_RIN-MEET_MIKE.title: Encounter Mike
TH_RIN-MEET_MIKE.pages.INITIAL.descripti:
On your way to the higher floors, you catch a glimpse of a [jitter]familiar[/jitter] figure.

[jitter]Is that[thinky_dots]...[/thinky_dots][gold]Mike?[/gold][/jitter]

She seems to recognize you too, smiling as she walks toward you carrying a bunch of things.

[fade_in]"Oh, it's Rin! What a coincidence to meet again here. Since that's the case, I'll give you a 20% discount. See anything you want?"[/fade_in]

Then, without waiting for your answer, she spreads out various goods in front of you, indicating you should pick some to buy.
TH_RIN-MEET_MIKE.pages.INITIAL.options.B:
Lose [red]200[/red][gold]Gold[/gold].
Gain [green]Make Peace with Cats[/green] and [green]Ghost Transport Cart[/green].
TH_RIN-MEET_MIKE.pages.BUY_RELIC.descrip: After thinking for a while, you decide to buy a couple of Power Cards. Although they are your own abilities, they can still enhance your power.
TH_RIN-MEET_MIKE.pages.BUY_POTION.descri: After a moment's thought, you feel a bit thirsty, so you decide to buy some potions to wet your throat.
TH_RIN-CAT_COFFEE.title: Cat Café
TH_RIN-CAT_COFFEE.pages.INITIAL.descript:
On your way deeper, you encounter a cat café. Honestly, you didn't expect the inside of the tower to be so modern; even such buildings exist.

Looking in from outside, you can see all kinds of cats playing with customers inside. It looks quite lively.

So, what do you do?
Advance to the next stage of the event.
TH_RIN-CAT_COFFEE.pages.IGNORE.descripti: Although you are curious, you decide not to waste time here and continue deeper into the tower.
TH_RIN-CAT_COFFEE.pages.SATORI.descripti:
Entering the cat café, you see many cute cats doing their best to beg for attention from customers in exchange for treats.

But that's not the point. The point is, you see a familiar figure — yes, it's —

[purple]Lady Satori[/purple]?!
TH_RIN-CAT_COFFEE.pages.SATORI.options.A:
Gain [gold]Rose Cake[/gold].
Add a [red]Suspicion[/red] to your [gold]deck[/gold].
TH_RIN-CAT_COFFEE.pages.AHEAD.descriptio:
Excitedly, you walk up and call out to [purple]Lady Satori[/purple]. However, she seems a bit flustered when she sees you.

Hurriedly, she takes a cake from her bag, gives it to you as a gift, and then rushes off. How strange.
TH_RIN-CAT_COFFEE.pages.WATCH.descriptio:
You don't make a sound, just quietly watch [purple]Lady Satori[/purple], trying to figure out what she's doing.

After a while, you realize she's just here to pet cats.

Darn, she has cats at home, so why come out?!

Although a bit indignant, you still stay quiet, just observing, hoping to improve your skills so Lady Satori will enjoy petting cats with you more and won't need to come out here.
TH_RIN-CAT_COFFEE.pages.CHEN.description:
Entering the cat café, you see many cute cats doing their best to beg for attention from customers in exchange for treats.

But that's not the point. The point is, you see a familiar figure — yes, it's —

[gold]Chen[/gold].

You notice she seems to be trying to make the café's cats become her subordinates, though it doesn't look very successful.
TH_RIN-CAT_COFFEE.pages.CHEN.options.PUL: Take her to do something else
TH_RIN-CAT_COFFEE.pages.PULL.description:
Seeing this, you decide to take [gold]Chen[/gold] to do something else to cheer her up. Surely she'll forget about what just happened.

And indeed, after playing with her for a while, she seems to completely forget.

Later, Ran Yakumo arrives and takes [gold]Chen[/gold] away. Before leaving, Ran gives you a red envelope as thanks for looking after Chen.
TH_RIN-CAT_COFFEE.pages.CHEN.options.TEA: Teach her how to command cats
TH_RIN-CAT_COFFEE.pages.TEACH.descriptio:
Seeing [gold]Chen[/gold] continually fail to grasp the knack of commanding, you feel a bit sorry for her.

So you approach and give her a personal lesson. [gold]Chen[/gold] is very happy and gives you some small trinkets.
TH_RIN-CAT_COFFEE.pages.NOTHING.descript:
Entering the cat café, you see many cute cats doing their best to beg for attention from customers in exchange for treats.

Other than that, there doesn't seem to be anything noteworthy.

But you think you could do some odd jobs here to earn some pocket money and also help [purple]Lady Satori[/purple] with her worries.
TH_RIN-CAT_COFFEE.pages.WORK.description: You work for an hour and earn a decent amount of money, but your spirit becomes a bit tired.
TH_RIN-CAT_COFFEE.pages.BACK.description:
"About time."

Thinking this, you decide to leave the cat café and continue deeper into the tower.
TH_RIN-MYSTERIOUS_CAT_CORPSE.title: Mysterious Cat Corpse
TH_RIN-MYSTERIOUS_CAT_CORPSE.pages.INITI:
You enter a strange room. In the center is a surgical machine, on which lies a [jitter]black cat's corpse[/jitter].

The corpse is somewhat [jitter][purple]dismembered[/purple][/jitter], as if someone has taken away some of its parts. It looks [jitter]quite gruesome[/jitter].

Next to the machine is an iron tray containing several surgical instruments stained with mottled dark red blood, presumably used for the 'surgery' on this cat corpse.

So, what do you do?
TH_RIN-MYSTERIOUS_CAT_CORPSE.pages.COMBI:
After you place the [gold]claw[/gold], [gold]eyes[/gold], [gold]head[/gold], and [gold]tail[/gold] you obtained elsewhere onto the corpse, and sew them together with a needle and thread, [jitter]something terrifying happens![/jitter]

[jitter]The corpse that should have been dead comes back to life!!![/jitter]

After a long while, you determine that it only has vague consciousness and is not aggressive at all, though for some reason it keeps following you. But at this point, you can only let it do so.
TH_RIN-MYSTERIOUS_CAT_CORPSE.pages.DISAS: Thinking of waste not, want not, you pick up the surgical instruments from the iron tray and carefully [jitter]dismember[/jitter] the corpse, obtaining several useful items.
